name: Current Affairs in Indian Economy & TN Dev. Admin. (6): India's Unicorn Startup Ecosystem 2026

sourceRefs.label: tracxn.com/failory.com - India's unicorn startup count (87, 3rd globally) and 2026's newest unicorns (Juspay, KreditBee, Skyroot Aerospace)

researchNotes: Sixth Economy current-affairs topic (6th lap). Skyroot Aerospace's unicorn status (7 May 2026) is a nice Economy-meets-Science bridge, since it's a private spaceflight/rocket company. Expansion pass (Batch 19): added the precise 'unicorn' definition (USD 1 billion+ valuation) for readers unfamiliar with the term.

reading.intro: Covers India's startup 'unicorn' (companies valued at $1+ billion) ecosystem and its newest entrants in 2026.

qa.question: How many unicorn startups does India have as of mid-2026, and where does this rank globally?
qa.answer: 87 unicorns — ranking 3rd globally, behind the USA (1,196 unicorns, 1st) and China (248 unicorns, 2nd).

qa.question: Which Indian city leads in number of unicorn startups, and what are the next 2 cities?
qa.answer: Bengaluru leads with 55 unicorns, followed by Mumbai (22) and Gurugram (21).

qa.question: Which sector has produced the most Indian unicorns?
qa.answer: Consumer (60 unicorns), followed by Enterprise Applications (41) and Retail (38).

qa.question: Name 2026's first 3 new Indian unicorns, in order, and their respective fields.
qa.answer: 1. Juspay (January 2026) — fintech/payments. 2. KreditBee (April 2026) — fintech/lending. 3. Skyroot Aerospace (7 May 2026) — private spaceflight/rocket launch services.

qa.question: What is a 'unicorn' startup, precisely, and why is the term used?
qa.answer: A privately-held startup company valued at USD 1 billion or more. The term 'unicorn' was coined because such companies were once considered as rare/mythical as the creature — though the term has become more common as the number of unicorns worldwide has grown into the thousands.
